what_it_does: Configures TypeScript compiler options for the canvas/app package, targeting ES2020 with DOM/ES2020 libraries, ESNext modules, bundler resolution, React JSX transform, no emit, and source scope limited to src/.
standouts: bundler moduleResolution combined with allowImportingTsExtensions and noEmit
conventions: Follows modern bundler-oriented tsconfig patterns (ESNext, noEmit, bundler resolution)
Uses the automatic React JSX runtime
Disables strict type checking, departing from recommended TypeScript strictness
concerns: strict: false weakens compile-time type safety
skipLibCheck: true hides potential type issues in dependencies
allowJs with strict false may admit unchecked JavaScript
notes: A permissive, bundler-oriented TypeScript configuration for a React app whose source lives under src/.
questions: Are there separate tsconfig files for tests, build, or linting?
Why is strict type checking disabled?
intention_signals: It appears intended to let a modern bundler transpile a React/TypeScript app with minimal TypeScript enforcement, DOM APIs, and ES2020 syntax.
contribution: Provides the TypeScript compiler configuration that defines the module system, JSX transform, target environment, included source scope, and type-checking strictness for the canvas/app package.
summary_for_embedding: A tsconfig.json for company/canvas/app that targets ES2020 DOM with ESNext modules, bundler moduleResolution, react-jsx, noEmit, strict false, and includes only src/.
intention_for_embedding: To configure TypeScript for a bundler-driven React application with permissive type checking and modern browser APIs.
